name: Advance Collateral Lending
description_short: Beverly Hills pawn shop offering collateral loans and jewelry/watch purchases with 28+ years of experience. Licensed, bonded, and regulated by California.
description_long:
Advance Collateral Lending, LLC (ACL90210) is a licensed pawnbroker operating in Beverly Hills, California since established with over 28 years of experience in the collateral lending industry. The company specializes in jewelry appraisal, precious metals, watches, diamonds, coins, and estate items. They operate under California Pawnbroker License #19100970 and are located at 409 N. Camden Drive, Suite 206 in Beverly Hills.

ACL90210 offers two primary transaction types: collateral-based loans against personal property (jewelry, watches, estate items) and outright purchases of these same items. Customers can convert valuable possessions into immediate cash through either secured loans with redemption periods or direct sales. The company emphasizes fast transaction processing, with testimonials noting completion in minutes for jewelry transactions.

The company differentiates itself through emphasis on privacy and discretion, explicitly contrasting themselves with pawn shops featured in reality television. They highlight their professional memberships in the National Pawnbrokers Association, California Pawnbrokers Association, and Beverly Hills Chamber of Commerce. ACL90210 also operates an educational blog focused on jewelry, watches, and collateral lending information. All loans are subject to California's regulated interest rates and include standard protections such as a 10-day grace period on 4-month loans.

As a traditional pawnbroker, ACL90210 is best suited for individuals needing immediate cash against valuable personal property, particularly jewelry and watches. The 28+ years of experience and Beverly Hills location suggest focus on higher-value items. However, customers should understand pawn lending involves asset liquidation, higher effective costs compared to traditional credit, and redemption deadlines.
address: 409 N Camden Dr #206, Beverly Hills, CA 90210

company_info.headquarters: 409 N Camden Dr #206, Beverly Hills, CA 90210

pros: 28+ years of specialized experience in jewelry, watches, diamonds, coins, and precious metals appraisal
Licensed (California #19100970), bonded, and insured with regulated interest rates set by state law
Member of National Pawnbrokers Association, California Pawnbrokers Association, and Beverly Hills Chamber of Commerce
Emphasis on privacy and discretion—explicitly contrasts with reality TV pawn shops
Fast transaction processing—customer testimonial reports converting broken jewelry to cash in minutes
Competitive rates verified by customer who compared multiple pawn shops before choosing ACL90210
4-month loans include 10-day grace period for redemption or renewal per California regulations
cons: Limited geographic accessibility—single location in Beverly Hills may not serve broader customer base
Pawn lending inherently requires giving up personal property; no credit-building or loan repayment benefit
Website lacks specific interest rate ranges or loan terms—customers must call or visit to learn rates
No mention of online or remote appraisal services; appears to require in-person transactions
Higher effective costs compared to traditional personal loans or credit products for those who qualify
best_for: Individuals with valuable jewelry, watches, or estate items needing immediate cash without credit checks
Collectors of high-value items (Rolex watches, precious metals) seeking expert appraisal and fair market value
Beverly Hills/Los Angeles residents seeking private, discreet transactions without public exposure
People looking to sell broken or unwanted jewelry and precious metals for cash
diagnosis: ACL90210 is best for individuals in the Los Angeles area with valuable jewelry, watches, or estate items who need immediate cash and prefer to avoid credit inquiries or traditional lending. The main caveat is that pawn lending means surrendering physical assets with strict redemption deadlines; it is not a credit-building tool and carries higher effective costs than alternative personal credit products.
services: Collateral loans against jewelry, watches, and estate items
Direct purchase and liquidation of jewelry, gold, silver, and platinum
Watch and timepiece appraisal and lending
Expert jewelry and precious metals knowledge consultation
Educational blog on jewelry, watches, and collateral lending topics
